## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Yourco and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and upcoming tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance: Overall blog traffic impressions remain high, but clicks have decreased (likely due to AI overviews affecting SEO industry-wide)](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [New team structure: Carrie introduced as new managing editor to support Sadira and improve workflow](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Content calendar improvements: Jessica requested better visibility into upcoming content and prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [Schema markup: Plans to implement article and FAQ schemas to improve Google rankings](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Restructuring

  - [Carrie Chowske introduced as new managing editor to support Sadira](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - [Prateek is ill (ear infection) but working](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Team expanding to handle increased workload and ensure consistent coverage](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)

### Content Production and Performance

  - [168 articles published, 2 reviewed, 2 refreshed, 2 enriched](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [6 articles ready for publishing by end of day, 2 extra added to catch up on production](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [Blog traffic: High impressions, but clicks decreased (industry-wide trend)](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=497.0)
  - [GrowthX content showing stable rise in performance](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=520.0)
  - [Top performing clusters: employee texting, enterprise-related incident communications, translations](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Backlinks showing steady rise](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=614.0)
  - [LLM referral traffic: 5-8 clicks (4 from GrowthX content)](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Share of voice increased slightly](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### SEO and Technical Improvements

  - [Planning to implement two schemas: Article and FAQ](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Google Doc shared with schema implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [No changes needed on UX/UI, only backend implementation required](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

### Content Calendar and Visibility

  - [Jessica requested improved organization in Airtable for better visibility](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=974.0)
  - [Sadira to add publish dates and create a view for the next month's content](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Carrie to work on setting up a more user-friendly view for Jessica](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)

### Content Strategy and Performance Analysis

  - [Jessica shared a simple analysis of new article performance](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [Identified patterns in successful articles (specific, niche content)](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)
  - [Requested deeper analysis in the upcoming 6-month performance review](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1362.0)
  - [Focus on doubling down on successful content types and optimizing underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)

### Prismic Platform Issues

  - [Formatting issues reported when publishing content](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
  - [Sadira experiencing difficulties with bolding and linking in Prismic](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1635.0)
  - [Jessica suggested screenshots for support team if issues persist](https://fathom.video/share/6ciEsczFppeWR4s1GBhsgJ7QqboMbEGZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
